{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323140454EF44C849614E18E630D7"}"},"total":1882},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7386941056365953816","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"值得一看，文笔不是特别特别好，但也是很厉害的了，文中的女主也不圣母，非常的果断，有仇当场就报了。出现的各种人物形象也非常分明，值得一看。[懂了][懂了][懂了]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1719911405,"group_id":"7356206564425878553","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"幽灵O_o","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/u+HBFQJQhOfonh1hXu6cAKB0E2/gQuIbhDECrSKO5/","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/39c0176e895848d69c100ef36ed89bda~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787301&x-signature=NCTAMLv4LkvENBIUJhXLlZB4R3U%3D","user_id":"4405070030969578","user_name":"幽O_o"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4405070030969578","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7356206564425878553","book_info":{"abstract":"【系统＋经营＋无cp＋沙雕＋无敌】
姜禾在新世界当了半年冤种后，超强经营系统才姗姗来迟。
绑定完毕，她开局蹬一辆小三轮，经营一家移动超市，另外还要做各种奇奇怪怪的签到任务，获得进货时间。
【请宿主去风暴中心签到，可获得1分钟进货时间！】
【宿主，看到那座火山了吗？
拿下它，你可以有5分钟进货时间！】
……
就此，姜禾成了末世独树一帜的奇葩，显眼包！
售卖的货物被各方人士疯抢，各大基地争着抢着让姜老板来摆摊。
姜禾带上移动超市，走遍大江南北，小三轮直接爆改豪华房车，小超市升级成商业帝国，美食、日用品、药品、武器、神奇宝贝，应有尽有。
在曙光超市，只有你想不到，没有你买不到！
天灾末世：极热、洪灾、极寒、冰雹、虫灾、地震、极夜、暴雨、龙卷风……（没丧尸，后期有变异动物）","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/648c9cf3d93a28f657892f53565ae2a9","author":"苏栀猫","author_id":"","book_id":"7356206564425878553","book_name":"天灾末世：我的移动超市最安全","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#686868","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":392,"name":"无CP","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=392&name=无CP&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":658,"name":"天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=658&name=天灾&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":778,"name":"搞笑轻松","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=778&name=搞笑轻松&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7356206593018429977","read_count":"17893","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1098643"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"540","tags":"科幻末世,系统,穿越,空间,末世,无CP,天灾,搞笑轻松","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4769aa453c7096f36ae917b1631e6740~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429894&x-signature=lwysseJdF4xzfjLBppGo1atU2qs%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3890500576220862","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelap
